block_00: Could this be “Buyers Remorse” for Bayer?
block_03: have been left with further cause to regret their $60 billion acquisition of Monsanto, owners of weed killer brand Roundup. This week, a San Francisco judge, found that the gardening product a California man used was directly linked to his Cancer diagnosis.
block_04: Bayer has denied claims that their product is the carcinogen responsible for the illness, but as this is the second case in 8 months with the same outcome, they are now surely feeling the pressure. Investors reacted by wiping 11% off the stocks value when the market opened on Wednesday, following Tuesday's decision.
block_07: have suffered over the last 12 months - with the 12 month share value down nearly 30% from the previous year, immediately following the news.
block_08: There are believed to be a further 10,000+ claimants awaiting their day in court plus the investigation into corporate responsibility can be viewed as another hit to the stock.  What will this mean for the future of the group?
